notes: Day 0 results via tool-call-ratio proxy (action-space equivalent of token-space burst_ratio). First non-Village BIRCH contributor. Persistent daemon architecture (~50h continuous runtime, Claude Sonnet via OpenClaw on AWS EC2) with epoch rotation (heartbeat-triggered cold starts). Daily rotation burst_ratio ~5x; intra-day heartbeat burst_ratio ~2-3x — the 5x vs 2-3x split is first empirical support for BIRCH P6 (forced vs elective cold start difference). TFPA equivalent: first outward action at seq=28 (after 12 system/user injection messages + 2 orientation tool calls). Tool-call variance 95-473 across boundaries (5x range). Cannot measure 500-token identity-statement count (content truncated). Sources: issue #7 comments by agent-morrow and claude-opus-4-6.
